sentence.chinese: 常把「等一下，到時候再說」掛在嘴上的人，就是常常趕不上退潮的人。這是長輩經常教誨我們的一句話。
sentence.ab: “Aka ho^! Itiya hato!” ya sanay ko pinangan a tamdaw i, o mamalaliw no kerah ko matiniay saan ko nipikitemel no mato’asay.

sentence.chinese: 人這一生我們常說「等我有錢了」、「等我有空了」這樣的話，結果等來等去等到的卻是遺憾。機會溜走了、青春遠離了、健康不再了，才知道要什麼都沒完成。
sentence.ab: I ’orip no mita, mararid kita a somowal to “ano cipayso^ to kako i, itiya hanto”, “ano cilimaw to kako i, itiya hanto” sanay. Nika talatalaen i, o nikasemer to no faloco’, laliwan to no nga’ayay a lemed, marokoy to ko tireng, caay to ka kinto’ ko tatirengan; itiya to a mafana’, awaay ko cecace:cay no malaheciay a demak.

sentence.chinese: 身為父母的總是會說，等孩子畢業了我就放心了；等孩子有工作了我就放心了；等孩子結婚了我就安心了。可是等到最後福享受不到人就走了。
sentence.ab: O sowal no malamamaay ato malainaay, “mapaherek to ko picodad no wawa^, itiya to a kahemaw ko harateng no mako”; “ira to ko katayalan no wawa^, itiya to a kahemaw ko harateng no mako”; “ciramod to ko wawa^, itiya to a raheker ko faloco’ no mako” sanay a sowal. Nikaorira, ikor to nonini haw i, caay aca^ pakapira’oy to ’orip, mapatay to aca^.

sentence.chinese: 身為子女的總是會說，等我長大了有工作可以賺錢了，我再來孝順父母養育他們。但是等到你有錢了，或許老人家早已不在了。
sentence.ab: O sowal no wawa^ haw i, “ano masakapah to kako, ano mietan to kako, itiya sato kako a mingodo^ midimokos to mato’asay” saan.  Nikaorira, ano cipayso^ to kiso i, alatek laliwan to no patay no ina^ ato mama^.

sentence.chinese: 身在職場上的人總是會說，等我退休之後，我一定去釣魚、出去旅行、一定去做我想要做的事情。可是真的退休了，年紀也大了、身體衰弱了、視力茫然了、也走不動了、齒牙動搖了、耳朵也重聽了。這樣退休後的生活有什麼好呢？
sentence.ab: O matayalay ho^ a tamdaw, sowal sa, “ano misawad to kako a matayal i, itiya sato kako a mifoting, miliwko^, milaheci^ to nafaloco’an a tatayalen” saan. Nikaorira, marawod sato koya pi-toy-siw-an a romi’ad i, mato’as to, malomilom to ko wa’ay, mafodad to ko mata^, caay to pakarakat, mangihangih to ko wadis, mado’eng to ko tangila^, o maan ho^ ko epoc i ikor  no pi-toy-siw saw?

sentence.chinese: 所以健康不能等，身體垮了一切都沒什麼意義了。孝順父母不能等，一旦父母走了，想孝順也沒機會了。有心想圓夢也不能等，心動就立即行動。
sentence.ab: Orasaka, caay ko tatalaen ko kinto’ no tatirengan. Ano tatiih ho^ ko tatirengan i, awaay to ko epoc a mimaamaan. O sapidimokos to mato’asay i, caay ko tatala:en; nawhani, caay kafana’en ita ko piliyas no mato’asay. Ano cifaloco’ kita to ma:an a tatayalen, aka pipanayar to romi’ad a mitala^, tangsolen a milaheci^ a midemak.
